title: Mossy Gui
description: A Gui pack to make it cosy and green!
body:
## Mossy Gui. 


### This pack makes the Gui mossy and lush themed, it will looks like its overgrown.  
\
It is mainly lush cave themed with some flowers to bring some color into it.  
![The Survival Inventory Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YRNoTW4F/images/dc3490b07ddebeef819e6f4b0544cd5be26f44f2.jpeg)  
- Also check out the Gallery for other examples!  

The Enchanting table is amethist themed, the brewing stand is nether themed, as this fits the theme nicely.  
It also changes the hot bar with a glow berry for when you selected that slot, The recipe book is also changed to fit better in.﻿  

- This pack is inspired by the Minecraft Earth adventure path Gui.
- It uses the dark mode Gui from vanilla tweaks as a base since it fits more.
